negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_f7247d16-f2db-4807-9e49-b5141861f6cf
prompt: The video opens with a view from the top of a vehicle, looking out onto a road under construction in a rural or suburban area. The scene is set against an overcast sky, casting a muted light over the landscape. A body of water and distant hills are visible in the background. The road is partially blocked off with orange traffic cones and barriers, and a stack of yellow barriers is positioned on the right side. An ego vehicle is moving near the construction area marked with a "STOP" sign, and a worker wearing high-visibility yellow-green clothing and a white hat is standing to its right, holding a shovel and moving slightly. The worker appears to be assisting with the construction. In the distance, another worker can be seen standing near the same stack of yellow barriers.  As the video progresses, the black SUV moves forward slowly and consistently, navigating through the construction zone. The worker initially standing beside the SUV slightly turns along the side of the road, still holding the shovel. The SUV continues its movement, passing the worker, who then stops and stands near the edge of the road. Meanwhile, a white car approaches from the opposite direction, driving past the construction site without stopping. The scene remains consistent with the overcast sky and the presence of traffic cones and barriers marking the construction area. By the final frame, the black SUV has moved further away from the construction site, and the white car has passed by. The worker who was previously standing near the edge of the road is no longer visible, suggesting they may have moved out of the frame. The overall scene continues to depict the ongoing road construction activity, with the construction barriers and cones still in place and different vehicles moving cautiously around the area in both directions.
